name: @modulens/angular
description: Architecture, structure, and quality analysis CLI for Angular workspaces. Scans projects, detects risks, and generates HTML reports.

scripts.test: ts-node src/angular/intelligence/decomposition/decomposition-naming.spec.ts && ts-node src/core/metrics-validation.spec.ts && ts-node src/core/structure-analyzer.spec.ts && ts-node src/angular/family/family-detector.spec.ts && ts-node src/core/analysis-snapshot.spec.ts && ts-node src/report/html/overview-metrics.spec.ts && ts-node src/report/html/report-overview-insights.spec.ts && ts-node src/report/html/components-summary-line.spec.ts && ts-node src/report/severity/severity-resolver.spec.ts && ts-node src/angular/workspace/workspace-reader.spec.ts && ts-node src/report/html/escape-html.spec.ts && ts-node src/core/run-scan-validation.spec.ts && ts-node src/cli/scan-output.spec.ts && ts-node src/cli/package-version.spec.ts && ts-node src/cli/commander-open-flag.spec.ts

author: Sinan Yılmaz
